archimate:DataObject.name: Feedback form
archimate:DataObject.documentation:
Definition: The Feedback Form is instrumental in acquiring opinions or responses from customers or users. It usually contains questions or prompts that invite comments on services, products, or experiences. This form can include rating scales, open-ended questions, or specific feedback areas. It's vital for businesses seeking to improve their services or products, understand customer satisfaction, and engage with their audience in a meaningful way.
Interoperability Dimension: Structural IoP
LOST view: SV-Forms Structure
Identifier: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/egovera/FeedbackFormDataObject
ABB name: egovera:FeedbackFormDataObject
EIRA concept: eira:ArchitectureBuildingBlock
Last modification: 2023-11-20
Identifier: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/egovera/FeedbackFormDataObject
Interoperability Layer: Semantic
Specialises: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/FormsStructureDataObject

properties.value: The Feedback Form is instrumental in acquiring opinions or responses from customers or users. It usually contains questions or prompts that invite comments on services, products, or experiences. This form can include rating scales, open-ended questions, or specific feedback areas. It's vital for businesses seeking to improve their services or products, understand customer satisfaction, and engage with their audience in a meaningful way.
